codeReview.summary: Comprehensive and well-structured test suite for ActivityTracker. All 16 assertions (VAL-ACTIVITY-001 through VAL-ACTIVITY-016) are covered by 31 test cases across 6 describe blocks. Mocking is clean with proper beforeEach clearing. Edge cases for null/undefined modules are tested. The tests accurately reflect the source code's conditional logic for complete/uncomplete paths, streak recording, and snapshot gating.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker added `jest: 'readonly'` to ESLint globals in eslint.config.js to fix lint errors from jest.mock() calls in test files. This is a valid fix for a pre-existing gap — AGENTS.md mentions using jest.mock() but didn't document that ESLint needed the jest global configured for test files.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discoveredIssues notes: 'eslint.config.js was missing jest as a global for test files'. The fix was needed because AGENTS.md instructs mocking patterns but the ESLint config didn't recognize jest globals in test files.

summary: All 16 assertions (VAL-ACTIVITY-001 through VAL-ACTIVITY-016) are thoroughly covered by 31 well-structured tests. The test file at src/utils/__tests__/activityTracker.test.js correctly mocks all three tracker dependencies (ProgressTracker, StreakTracker, PerformanceTracker) and verifies both positive and negative code paths for all 6 exported ActivityTracker methods. Edge cases (null modules, undefined modules, empty arrays, zero ratings) are properly tested. Test naming is clear and maps directly to assertion requirements. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
